summary: Large decomp-matching PR for src/sysdolphin/baselib/texpdag.c. It replaces placeholders for HSD_TExpMakeDag and SimplifySrc with C, adds SimplifyThis and related helper macros/static data, adjusts order_dag and make_full_dependancy_mtx for matching, and includes baselib/debug.h for HSD_ASSERT. Bot output reports one new exact match for make_full_dependancy_mtx, several unmatched-item improvements, and one tiny broken match in HSD_TExpSchedule.

key_files.role: Only changed source file; contains texpdag DAG construction, dependency matrix, scheduling, and simplification code changes.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: include baselib/debug.h; HSD_TExpMakeDag replaces placeholder; SimplifySrc replaces placeholder; SimplifyThis and macros added

what_changed.text: Added #include "baselib/debug.h" and used HSD_ASSERT in newly recovered texpdag code.
Adjusted order_dag local types and recursive-call argument handling: new_available, blocked, and dep_bits became u32, and temporary pointer locals sp8/spC/sp10 were introduced before recursive calls.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: int new_available/blocked/dep_bits changed to u32
raw_diff: recursive order_dag calls pass sp8, spC, sp10

what_changed.text: Implemented HSD_TExpMakeDag, including traversal of color and alpha TEV inputs, distance initialization and sorting, DAG entry setup, dependency/reference counting, and HSD_ASSERT checks.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: -/// #HSD_TExpMakeDag + int HSD_TExpMakeDag(HSD_TExp* root, HSD_TExpDag* list)
raw_diff: sp94[32], sp14[32], CalcDistance, dag->idx, dag->nb_ref, dag->nb_dep, dag->tev, depend, nb_ref

what_changed.text: Adjusted make_full_dependancy_mtx by hoisting flag and old assignments around the inner dependency loop; bot report says this item became a new 100.00% match.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: make_full_dependancy_mtx flag = 1 << j; old = full[j]; bits = old

what_changed.text: Implemented SimplifySrc, simplifying TEV color and alpha arguments, handling dead op 0xFF cases, GX_TEV_ADD passthrough cases, texture/raster resource checks, ref/unref updates, and default argument clearing through static data.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_TExpSimplify, HSD_TExpUnref, HSD_TExpRef, GX_TEV_ADD, HSD_TE_TEX, HSD_TE_RAS

what_changed.text: Added static data HSD_TExpDag_804D5FF8 and HSD_TExpDag_804D5FFC, plus local macros CLEAR_ARG, BIAS_TO_INT, INT_TO_BIAS, and RESOURCE_CONFLICT for simplification code.
Added or exposed SimplifyThis logic that repeatedly scans color/alpha TEV inputs for texture and raster use and clears or updates arg0 tev resource fields when inputs no longer need them.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: color_tex, alpha_tex, color_ras, alpha_ras initialized to -1; switches over c_in/a_in indices; clears tex/tex_swap and chan/ras_swap

what_changed.text: Bot report also attributes improvement to SimplifyByMerge, but the loaded diff excerpt is truncated before that code is visible.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: truncated before full remaining file

smart_moves.text: Using HSD_ASSERT with debug.h is consistent with existing project assert cleanup expectations when recovered code has assert line evidence.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: baselib/debug.h include and HSD_ASSERT calls

smart_moves.text: Keeping unknown static data as address-style HSD_TExpDag_804D5FF8/HSD_TExpDag_804D5FFC avoids over-naming the data while still allowing the simplification code to reference recovered storage.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static s32 HSD_TExpDag_804D5FF8; static HSD_TExp* HSD_TExpDag_804D5FFC

smart_moves.text: The PR separates a confirmed small exact-match win, make_full_dependancy_mtx, from partial-score improvements in larger unmatched functions as reported by the bot.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: 1 new match make_full_dependancy_mtx; 5 improvements in unmatched items

decomp_lessons.lesson: For dependency bitset propagation code, small local-lifetime and assignment-placement changes can be enough to close an exact match; here moving flag and old/bits setup in make_full_dependancy_mtx is tied to the reported 100% result.

Large HSD_TExp DAG/simplification functions may require preserving generated-looking loop labels and pointer-walk shapes during an intermediate matching PR; the evidence shows partial improvements, not final cleanup.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: loop_22, loop_8, loop_16, loop_36, loop_65, loop_41, loop_43, loop_54, loop_56

decomp_lessons.lesson: When simplifying TEV expressions, resource ownership checks for texture objects, texture swaps, raster channels, and raster swaps are part of the recovered control flow and should not be dropped as cosmetic.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: arg0->tev.tex, tex_swap, chan, ras_swap checks and updates

naming_conventions.text: Recovered functions use existing HSD_TExp/HSD_TE/HSD_TObj type and function prefixes rather than new semantic renames.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_TExpMakeDag, HSD_TExpSimplify, HSD_TExpRef, HSD_TExpUnref, HSD_TE_TEV, HSD_TObj

naming_conventions.text: Unidentified local static data remains address-style under the file prefix: HSD_TExpDag_804D5FF8 and HSD_TExpDag_804D5FFC.
Local helper macros added for repeated simplification expressions are uppercase: CLEAR_ARG, BIAS_TO_INT, INT_TO_BIAS, RESOURCE_CONFLICT.
Some locals remain temporary/generated-style, including sp94, sp14, sp8, spC, sp10, tmp, tmp2, loop_count*, and label names loop_*; the PR evidence does not prove these are intended final style.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_TExpMakeDag local declarations and loop labels

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Introduced explicit stack-like pointer temporaries sp8/spC/sp10 before recursive calls in order_dag, likely to affect register/stack lifetime, but the PR slice does not include direct objdiff proof for that local tactic.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: order_dag adds sp8/spC/sp10 and passes them to recursive calls

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Changed integer bit-mask locals to u32 in order_dag to better express and likely match bit operations.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: new_available, blocked, dep_bits changed from int to u32

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used pointer iteration and manual do/while or goto-shaped loops over TEV input arrays in HSD_TExpMakeDag rather than immediately normalizing every repeated block to high-level for loops.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: cur = (HSD_TExp*) ((u8*) cur + sizeof(HSD_TEArg)); do while i < 4
raw_diff: loop_8, loop_16, loop_41, loop_54 search loops

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used small macros for repeated TEV simplification operations and ternary bias conversions.
Hoisted/reshaped local assignments in make_full_dependancy_mtx; bot report identifies this function as the exact new match.

review_feedback.text: decomp-dev[bot] reported matched code changed by -264 bytes / -0.01%, with one new match: make_full_dependancy_mtx in main/sysdolphin/baselib/texpdag, 98.83% to 100.00%.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: Report for GALE01; Matched code 66.44% (-0.01%, -264 bytes); 1 new match make_full_dependancy_mtx

review_feedback.text: Bot reported one broken match: HSD_TExpSchedule went from 100.00% to 99.98%, -1 byte.
Bot reported unmatched-item improvements for SimplifyByMerge, SimplifyThis, SimplifySrc, HSD_TExpMakeDag, and .sdata.

accepted_candidate_records.title: texpdag dependency matrix exact match came from local assignment/lifetime reshaping
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2468, make_full_dependancy_mtx in src/sysdolphin/baselib/texpdag.c became a reported 100.00% match after local reshaping around flag = 1 << j, old = full[j], and bits = old. Use as a narrow example of bitset dependency code being sensitive to assignment placement/lifetime.

accepted_candidate_records.title: texpdag simplification code resource fields are match-relevant
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2468's SimplifySrc/SimplifyThis changes repeatedly check and update HSD_TExp texture/raster fields such as tex, tex_swap, chan, and ras_swap while simplifying TEV inputs. Treat these resource conflict checks as meaningful control-flow/data-flow, not removable cleanup.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: SimplifySrc checks tex, tex_swap, chan, ras_swap
text_corpus: SimplifySrc and SimplifyThis score improvements

source_update_candidates.title: texpdag.c owns HSD_TExp DAG/simplification/scheduling work
source_update_candidates.text: src/sysdolphin/baselib/texpdag.c contains HSD_TExp DAG construction and simplification/scheduling routines, including HSD_TExpMakeDag, make_full_dependancy_mtx, HSD_TExpSchedule, SimplifySrc, SimplifyThis, and SimplifyByMerge according to PR 2468 evidence.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_TExpMakeDag, make_full_dependancy_mtx, HSD_TExpSchedule, SimplifySrc, SimplifyThis
source_update_candidates.reason: Path/system classification support for future searches; should be curated as a path fact only if consistent with current source.

source_update_candidates.title: Intermediate generated-looking loops need explicit match evidence before becoming style
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2468 shows large generated-looking loop-label code in HSD_TExpMakeDag alongside only partial score improvements. Consider reinforcing that such shapes may be tolerated as intermediate matching work, but should not be promoted to preferred source style without exact objdiff evidence and cleanup attempts.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: HSD_TExpMakeDag 0.00% -> 62.16%, not reported as exact match
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a standards reinforcement candidate, not a new accepted lesson; current standards already caution against preserving generated-looking loops without evidence.

source_update_candidates.title: Bot score reports should record broken-match regressions even in progress PRs
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2468 made several unmatched-item improvements and one exact match, but bot output also reported HSD_TExpSchedule regressed from 100.00% to 99.98%. Consider adding examples to the verification ledger guidance that small neighboring regressions should be captured in postmortems and resolved or justified before curation.
source_update_candidates.reason: The existing standard covers regression ledgers; this PR provides a concrete example candidate if the curator wants examples.

rejection_notes: Do not record the PR as proving HSD_TExpMakeDag, SimplifySrc, SimplifyThis, or SimplifyByMerge exact matches; bot evidence only reports partial improvements for those symbols.
Do not infer that loop_* labels, sp* locals, or generated-looking pointer walks are accepted final style; loaded evidence lacks human review or objdiff justification for those specific shapes.
Do not treat HSD_TExpDag_804D5FF8/HSD_TExpDag_804D5FFC names as semantic data names; they are address-style placeholders in the diff.
Do not claim the HSD_TExpSchedule regression was reviewed or accepted by humans; only bot evidence is loaded.
